atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right elbow pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right elbow pain that began approximately one week ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is exacerbated by wrist flexion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is exacerbated by resisted movement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent trauma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has tried ibuprofen with minimal relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty lifting due to the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain occasionally disrupts sleep.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has not previously injured this elbow.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals moderate tenderness to palpation of the medial epicondyle.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pain is elicited with resisted wrist flexion and pronation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is limited by pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vitals are stable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a sling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to apply ice packs to the elbow.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to apply ice packs to the elbow for 20 minutes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to apply ice packs to the elbow three times daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen 600 mg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen 600 mg every 6 hours.
